reviews.comment:
Te atienden con toda la paja del mundo... 1 isla funcionando y la fila da la vuelta manzana...
40min para llenar un tanque...
Aconsejo ir a otros estación de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
They treat you with the most ridiculous nonsense... only one pump is working and the line goes around the block... 40 minutes to fill a tank... I recommend going to another gas station.
